task_completion.description: Disable water surface visualization to reveal bathymetry
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map view shows exposed underwater topography (bathymetry/terrain) rather than a solid or textured blue water surface. The 'Water Surface' option in the View menu or sidebar is unchecked or disabled.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Axial Seamount coordinates
task_completion.visual_evidence: The application displays coordinates approximately matching 45.95°N, 130.01°W in the status bar or navigation panel. The view centers on a seamount structure.
A 'New Placemark' or 'Properties' dialog is visible, and the 'Name' field contains the text 'Axial Seamount'.
In the placemark dialog, the 'Description' field contains the text 'Active submarine volcano, Juan de Fuca Ridge'.

task_completion.description: Verify placemark placement on the map
task_completion.visual_evidence: A placemark icon (e.g., a pushpin) labeled 'Axial Seamount' is clearly visible on the map view at the target location.

task_completion.description: Save the final screenshot to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save dialog or file explorer window confirms the file is being saved to or exists at '/home/ga/Documents/axial_seamount_survey.png'.

integrity.description: Verify use of a GIS application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the interface of a 3D globe or GIS application (e.g., Google Earth, Marble) with map controls, layers panel, and menu bars.

integrity.description: Ensure screenshot is not fabricated via image editing
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is not seen using an image editor (like GIMP) to manually draw text or icons onto a static background image.
The agent interacts with the application's GUI dialogs to input the placemark name and description, rather than using terminal commands to generate the file directly.
